title: Home Depot delivery and supply-chain modernization
summary: Supported retail order and supply-chain platform modernization tied to faster fulfillment, expanded delivery options, and distribution-network growth for stores, homes, and job sites.
impactValue: YoY value: +6.9% sales growth in 2016; +6.7% in 2017

title: Self-checkout and store technology modernization
summary: Contributed to retail platform delivery during a period of checkout modernization, store experience improvements, and front-end technology evolution.
impactValue: YoY value: +7.2% sales growth in 2018; +1.9% in 2019

title: Equifax cloud-native security and platform transformation
summary: Led and contributed to secure cloud-ready application modernization, identity and fraud platform engineering, API orchestration, and technology-security work as Equifax advanced its cloud transformation.
impactValue: YoY value: +17.7% revenue growth in 2020; +19.3% in 2021

title: Digital identity, fraud, and new-product innovation
summary: Advanced identity and fraud services, digital identity capabilities, cloud-based data products, and secure decisioning platforms supporting customer growth and fraud-risk mitigation.
impactValue: YoY value: +4% revenue growth in 2022; new-product revenue up 50%+
